title: Crispy Bitter German Peach Salad
description: A quick, savory salad that balances the sweetness of peaches with the sharp bite of arugula and radicchio, finished with crunchy pumpkin seeds and a zesty mustard vinaigrette.
instructions: Whisk together mustard, vinegar, honey, olive oil, salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes to make a vinaigrette; set aside.
Pat peach slices dry and sear in a hot non‑stick skillet 1‑2 minutes per side until caramelized and slightly crispy; remove and let cool slightly.
Toast pumpkin seeds in the same skillet until golden, 3‑4 minutes; set aside.
Toss arugula and radicchio with the vinaigrette until evenly coated.
Arrange the seared peaches on top, sprinkle toasted seeds, crumbled feta, and chopped dill, then drizzle with any remaining vinaigrette.
Garnish with extra dill and a pinch of cracked pepper if desired.
Serve immediately as a crisp, flavorful weeknight lunch.
